change_comments.message:
Need to handle the below in a separate patchset.
1. Currently all the docs are referred from the master branch irrespective of the branch we are on/ release we are on. So need to use the release tag in conf.py 
2. The url for openapi file should also be used as per the release/branch we are on.
https://lf-onap.atlassian.net/browse/CPS-2857 created to handle the url in the RTD file and for the input url for interface generation.
